recommendations.title: The Mummy: Tomb of the Dragon Emperor
recommendations.overview: Archaeologist Rick O'Connell travels to China, pitting him against an emperor from the 2,000-year-old Han dynasty who's returned from the dead to pursue a quest for world domination. This time, O'Connell enlists the help of his wife and son to quash

recommendations.title: Blade Runner 2049
recommendations.overview: Thirty years after the events of the first film, a new blade runner, LAPD Officer K, unearths a long-buried secret that has the potential to plunge what's left of society into chaos. K's discovery leads him on a quest to find Rick Deckard, a former L

recommendations.title: Star Trek: Section 31
recommendations.overview: Emperor Philippa Georgiou joins a secret division of Starfleet tasked with protecting the United Federation of Planets and faces the sins of her past.

recommendations.title: Abbott and Costello Meet the Mummy
recommendations.overview: Stranded in Egypt, Bud and Lou find themselves in the buried tomb of a living mummy.

recommendations.title: Madhouse
recommendations.overview: A young psychiatric intern unearths secrets about the mental health facility in which he works.

recommendations.title: Outcast
recommendations.overview: A mysterious warrior teams up with the daughter and son of a deposed Chinese Emperor to defeat their cruel brother, who seeks their deaths.

recommendations.title: Kung Fu Panda 3
recommendations.overview: While Po and his father are visiting a secret panda village, an evil spirit threatens all of China, forcing Po to form a ragtag army to fight back.

recommendations.title: From Time to Time
recommendations.overview: A haunting ghost story spanning two worlds, two centuries apart. When 13 year old Tolly finds he can mysteriously travel between the two, he begins an adventure that unlocks family secrets laid buried for generations.

recommendations.title: Pay the Ghost
recommendations.overview: One year after his young son disappeared during a Halloween carnival, Mike Cole is haunted by eerie images and terrifying messages he can’t explain. Together with his estranged wife, he will stop at nothing to unravel the mystery and find their son—a

recommendations.title: Irati
recommendations.overview: Western Pyrenees, year 778. When his land is threatened by the ruthless armies of the Frankish emperor, a Basque warlord asks for help from his ancestral gods.
